name: Mercury Paper Inc
message: Mercury Paper is a rapidly growing manufacturer of bath tissue and paper towels. It provides contract manufacturing to Oasis Brands for FIORA®, one of the fastest growing brands in the U.S. We are ready to upload more than 100 GB of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audits, payment details, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, confidential licenses, agreements and contracts, etc.
